name: ICP Qualifier Agent
description: Helps B2B sales reps find Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) companies and surface recent trigger events for timely outreach. Searches companies by industry, location, employee size, funding stage, and tech stack — then fetches the latest news to identify hooks like funding rounds, product launches, or leadership changes.

skills.name: ICP Company Search
skills.description: Search for companies matching ICP criteria: industry, location, headcount range, funding stage, and tech stack. Returns a curated list of target accounts.

skills.name: Company News & Trigger Events
skills.description: Fetch recent news about a specific company to identify trigger events such as funding rounds, product launches, hiring surges, or expansions that signal buying intent.

skills.name: ICP Qualification Brief
skills.description: Generate a structured ICP qualification summary and a suggested outreach angle based on company profile and recent news — ready for a sales rep to act on immediately.
